title: Example Continuous
description: Synthetic continuous-mode dataset from the imzML specification. Great for testing basic viewer functionality.

title: Example Processed
description: Synthetic processed-mode dataset from the imzML specification. Each pixel carries a variable-length peak list.

title: Arabidopsis Thaliana Leaf (LA-ESI)
description: Laser ablation electrospray ionisation MSI of Arabidopsis thaliana leaf tissue. Negative ion mode, 100 µm pixel size.

title: Mouse Urinary Bladder (AP-SMALDI HR2MSI)
description: Atmospheric-pressure SMALDI high-resolution MSI of mouse urinary bladder tissue. 15 µm pixel size.

title: Gastric Mouse Tumor (MALDI FT-ICR)
description: MALDI FT-ICR MSI of mouse gastric tumor tissue (MassIVE MSV000086102). Download both .imzML and .ibd from the dataset page, then open them with the button above.
